name: Buzz's Lanikai
tagline: Old-school Kailua steakhouse steps from Lanikai Beach — the kiawe-grilled ahi steak is a local institution.
mustOrder: Kiawe-grilled ahi steak — seared over wood, served with garlic butter
Buzz's original steak — 10oz sirloin, simple and satisfying
Coconut shrimp — crispy and sweet, classic pupu
parking: Small parking lot in front, plus street parking on Kawailoa Rd. Beach traffic makes weekends tough — go weekday evenings.
talkStory: Founded by Buzz Schneider in 1962, making it one of Oahu's oldest continuously operating restaurants. The wood-paneled, tiki-era dining room hasn't changed much in 60 years — sandy-footed families sit next to couples on date night. The kiawe-grilled ahi steak, seared over real local kiawe wood, is the star. Perfect post-beach dinner after a Lanikai day. No reservations, no pretension — just show up and put your name in. Full bar now available.
